response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify two distinct performances based on visual setting and on-screen song metadata. 2. Identified songs as 'お米の美味しい炊き方、そしてお米を食べることによるその効果。' and 'Homesick Pt.2&3'. 3. Researched metadata and full lyrics using the composer/original artist names found in text and search results. 4. Confirmed performers in video are Hololive members (Flare, Fubuki, Watame). 5. Mapped scenes based on song structure and compiled final JSON data.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring three VTubers (Shiranui Flare, Shirakami Fubuki, and Tsunomaki Watame) from the Hololive agency, celebrating Shiranui Flare's 2026 birthday. They perform two songs from the BEMANI music game franchise: 'お米の美味しい炊き方、そしてお米を食べることによるその効果。' and 'Homesick Pt.2&3'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
1 hop 150CC measure accurately and incomparably.
Next, when washing, do not pour water directly on the rice, but use two fingers.
Next, do the washing, but do not pour water directly on the rice.
(Please be gentle, as if handling a cute little animal.)
(And)
(And)
Measure the water and JOIN! The amount is 1.2 times the rice.
After that, soak in water for about two hours, sadistically (!)
(And, and, and, with everything ready)
(Wait, wait)
(For the people, by the people, of the people)
(The act to perform is, is, is...)
Jar power ON!
Steam like a heat haze.
Stir from the bottom.
THE TIMING IS RIPE!
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
Vitamin, mineral, dietary fiber (& OTHER!)
Vitamin, mineral, dietary fiber.
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
Eat, dosukoi & dosukoi.
Eat, dosukoi & dosukoi.
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
Get the sumo wrestler's Power! (Get it!)
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
Ah, hold me romantically in a NIGHT FLIGHT.
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
Let's seduce the rice shop's girl! (Get it!!)
(GENIUS) All you can cook.
(SEXY) All you can eat.
(THRILLING) YEAH
SO I LOVE YOU (GET DAZE---!!!)
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
SUPER ENERGY MIRACLE POWER
Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.
Ah, rice, ah, rice.
Rice, delicious rice.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform 'Homesick Pt.2&3'. Text on screen indicates the song title. Performers play instruments and dance on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shiranui Flare, Shirakami Fubuki, Tsunomaki Watame
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
真昼と真夜中の間に立つ歌は真っ白なゲームといって耳もとではしゃぐ
パーフェクト僕らは完璧...なんて軽い冗談だった
いつも答えは127の項目
アスファルト蹴りあげたらトランプで決めて
急ぎ足で駆け出すのさ　今すぐバスで
そしてホームシック抱えながら人々は目指す
行き先はスマートに決めて　願いを叶えたいのなら
真夏と真冬の間に生まれた歌はまったりなカーブ描いてどこまでも進む
パーフェクト全ては同じ...似たもの同士だった
いつも答えは同じ音なんだ
ソフトロックで暴れたらトークバックでyeah!
差し出したルール　12月のスポーツ
バジルパスタの試食
明日の噂話をトランクに詰めて逆回しでやり直すのさ　悪い性格
それでホームシック語りながら人々は祈る
行先は満ちあふれてる　誰かが待ちわびるから
オレンジノイズ浴びながらショートカットでyeah!
新しいブーム　聞き飽きたフレーズ
バブルアワーの法則
さあ明日の噂話をトラックに載せて風に乗せて薔薇撒くのさ　誰の計画？
そしてホームシック笑いながら人々は迷う
行き先はそれぞれさ　皆、旅の途中なんだから
風に乗って羽ばたくのは　烏の計画
行き先はスピードを上げて　この先もまだ続くなら
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The song that stands between midday and midnight
Is a pure white game that makes your ears merry
Perfect, we are perfect... what a simple joke that was
The answer is always 127 things
Deciding it with cards whether to kick up the asphalt
And running off in a brisk trot to the bus now
While homesick people aim ahead and hold on
They choose a smart destination if you want your wish to be granted
The song that's born between midsummer and midwinter
Draws a relaxed curve to go ahead anywhere
Perfect, everything's the same... it was something like that
The answers always sound the same
Rampaging through the soft rock
So talk back, yeah!
Rules were held out for December's sports
While tasting basil pasta
Packing tomorrow's gossip into the trunk,
Starting over in reverse is bad character
While homesick people pray and talk
My destination is filled with someone waiting impatiently
Basked in orange noise
Is our shortcut, yeah!
The phrases that were tired of hearing newly boomed
That's the law of the bubble hour
Now we'll talk about tomorrow, to get back on track
Whose plan was it to sprinkle roses to the wind?
While homesick people get lost and laugh
Everybody has their own destination, and I'm in the middle of my journey
It's the crows' plan to fly along with the wind
Speeding ahead and still continuing towards the destination
